authProxy.proxyHint: bench signs in with this account in an isolated window (usually already signed in) and hands the result back to the external app automatically. bench never reads or stores the app's password or tokens.
authProxy.loginStarted: Sign-in started; bench will return to the external app automatically once complete (credentials are auto-filled for you to submit if a fresh login is needed)

proxyPaste.hint: Supports bench-auth:// links and raw https authorize URLs (including loopback callbacks like http://127.0.0.1:...).

cleanSpace.title: Clean Space
cleanSpace.subtitle: View disk usage, clean caches, logs and temp files to free up storage

tools.overviewDesc: View disk usage distribution and category details
tools.devProjectDesc: Scan and clean node_modules, caches in dev projects
tools.customFolderDesc: Select folders and clean expired files by rules
tools.recordsDesc: View historical cleanup operations and freed space stats

def.safe: Rebuildable caches, no side effects. e.g. app/user caches, browser caches, Trash, logs, duplicate downloads.
def.low: Recoverable or minimal impact. e.g. old iOS backups, unmounted DMGs, old Xcode simulators, mail attachment caches.
def.medium: Hard to recover or affects app config. e.g. rarely used apps, >1GB & >1yr old documents, Xcode DerivedData, non-core App Support.
def.high: Deletion causes system/others issues and is irreversible. e.g. core System Data, other users' files, Time Machine local snapshots, system logs, keychain/profiles, critical App Support.

overview.title: Storage Overview
overview.suggestionDesc: About {{size}} can be safely freed (caches, Trash, duplicate files). Select safe items to clean up at once.

riskWarning.highDesc: Selection contains high-risk items (e.g. system logs, other users' files, Time Machine local snapshots). Deletion is irreversible and may affect system or others' data. Please confirm carefully.
riskWarning.mediumDesc: Selection contains medium-risk items. Hard to recover after deletion, may affect related app configurations.

confirm.ack1: I understand the risks of the selected actions and confirm to proceed
confirm.ack2: I confirm deleting irreversible high-risk files

progress.completedWithFailures: Cleanup finished with {{failed}} failed item(s). You can select them and retry.

cleanSpace.confirmCleanupDesc2: Please review the commands and impact scope below before executing.

suggestions.title: Optimization Suggestions
suggestions.applications: Applications use {{size}}, consider removing unused apps
suggestions.system_data: System caches and logs use {{size}}, safe to clean
suggestions.developer: Developer tools use {{size}}, including Xcode and Docker

networkProbe.title: Network Probe
networkProbe.subtitle: First-aid diagnostics and targeted probes (module 1.0 / MVP A+B).

overview.empty: No summary yet. Refresh to load local network state.

tcp.hint: Probe TCP reachability to a host:port (developer essential).

ping.hint: ICMP echo probe with latency, jitter, and loss (requires Local Network permission on macOS).

dns.hint: Query DNS records via system resolver or a custom resolver IP.

probe.hint: Probe a host or URL with optional ICMP plus HTTP(S) and a light TLS handshake check.

sites.hint: Probe a built-in site pack with ICMP and/or HTTP latency. Custom hosts stream in with sparklines; cancel stops mid-run.

health.hint: Run L0→L3 first-aid checks. Items stream in as each check finishes.
health.empty: No scan yet. Run a health scan to populate the tree.

opinion.hint: Actionable advice from the latest health scan.

linkDown.title: No active network interface
linkDown.body: Check cable, Wi‑Fi switch, or Airplane Mode, then rescan.

noDefaultRoute.title: Missing default route
noDefaultRoute.body: Renew DHCP or check whether a VPN stole the default route.

noIpv4.title: No usable IPv4 address
noIpv4.body: Renew DHCP or verify static IP settings. APIPA (169.254.x) counts as failure.

dnsBroken.title: DNS looks broken
dnsBroken.body: System DNS list is empty or a known name failed to resolve. Try flush DNS or switch to a public resolver.

hostsHijack.title: Suspicious hosts overrides
hostsHijack.body: Common domains point to loopback/private addresses. Review /etc/hosts — Bench will not edit it automatically.

dnsVsIpDns.title: DNS / hosts issue (IP ok, name fail)
dnsVsIpDns.body: Gateway and public IP work, but name reachability failed. Prefer DNS or hosts fixes first.

dnsVsIpUplink.title: Uplink / firewall issue
dnsVsIpUplink.body: Gateway works but public IP does not. Check ISP uplink, firewall, or captive restrictions.

dnsVsIpLan.title: LAN / gateway issue
dnsVsIpLan.body: Default gateway is unreachable. Check Wi‑Fi/router before blaming the internet.

proxyOn.title: System proxy is enabled
proxyOn.body: A bad proxy/PAC can break browsing. Disable or fix the proxy, then rescan.

vpnActive.title: VPN / tunnel detected
vpnActive.body: Compare with VPN disconnected if connectivity is unexpected.

captive.title: Possible captive portal
captive.body: Open the portal login page (hotel/café Wi‑Fi) before diagnosing DNS.

allClear.title: Basic reachability looks healthy
allClear.body: If a specific site still fails, check that site, SNI/proxy, or run site latency probes.

fix.hint: Privilege-free self-heal actions. Backend re-validates services and DNS against a whitelist.

confirm.flushDesc: Clears the local DNS cache so new lookups use current resolvers.
confirm.flushConsequence: May briefly delay name resolution. Safe to repeat.
confirm.switchStep1Desc: This changes DNS servers for the selected network service.
confirm.switchStep1Consequence: Browsing may fail until DNS is reachable. You can revert in System Settings.
confirm.switchStep2Consequence: Only builtin preset IPs are accepted by the backend.
confirm.renewStep1Desc: Requests a new IP lease for the selected service.
confirm.renewStep1Consequence: You may briefly lose connectivity while renewing.
confirm.renewStep2Consequence: Service name must match the backend whitelist.
confirm.resetStep1Desc: This runs a high-impact self-heal: flush DNS cache and renew DHCP on the selected service.
confirm.resetStep1Consequence: You may briefly lose connectivity. Custom DNS is not cleared; only cache flush + DHCP renew.
confirm.resetStep2Desc: Will run flushDns() then renewDhcp('{{service}}'). Service must still exist when the backend re-checks.
confirm.resetStep2Consequence: Backend ignores any frontend “confirmed” flag and re-validates the service whitelist.
confirm.resetStep3Desc: Acknowledge the risk and type the confirmation phrase to execute.
confirm.resetStep3Consequence: This cannot be undone automatically. Re-run health scan afterward.
confirm.resetAck: I understand this may interrupt network connectivity.

offline.hint: Run captive portal, public egress IP, and proxy/VPN checks for “can't connect” triage.
offline.diffHint: DNS vs IP contrast lives in Health scan (`diff.dns_vs_ip`) and Advice. Run a health scan, then open Advice.
offline.viaTunnel: Default route appears to go through a tunnel.

from.test: Also available under Basics → Can't connect (same probe).

ipv6.hint: Check local IPv6 addresses, AAAA resolution, ICMPv6 reachability, optional HTTP over IPv6, NDP, and dual-stack contrast.

mtu.hint: Path MTU via DF binary search (macOS ping -D). Marks blackhole when large packets time out without Fragmentation Needed.

egress.hint: Resolve public egress IP via multi-source HTTPS APIs; ASN via Team Cymru DNS when available.

speed.hint: LibreSpeed-compatible bandwidth probe (ping / download / upload). Cancel stops mid-run.
speed.sourceUnavailable: This speed source looks unreachable. Try another source after the cooldown.

auth.title: Authorized-use only
auth.body: Security tools may scan hosts and inspect certificates. Confirm you will only probe assets you own or have explicit permission to test. Detection only — no attack features.
auth.confirmed: Security tools authorized for this device.

pollution.hint: Compare DNS answers across resolvers, scan hosts overrides, and probe HTTPS trust (corporate middleboxes vs failures).

whois.hint: RDAP lookup via rdap.org (WHOIS fallback not required for this build). Output may be truncated.

dnssec.hint: DNSSEC hints plus DoH/DoT reachability. Full AD-bit chain validation is not asserted in this build.

ports.hint: TCP connect scan of a host you own or are authorized to test. Max 256 ports; cancel stops mid-run.
ports.degradedHint: Degraded mode: TCP connect only. Install adv-scanner / nmap for SYN stealth.
ports.confirmDesc: Target {{target}} · about {{count}} ports. Public hosts or large ranges need an extra confirm.
ports.confirmConsequence: Only scan assets you own or are authorized to test. TCP connect only (no SYN).

arp.hint: List neighbors from the OS ARP/neighbor cache (degraded discovery).
arp.degradedHint: Degraded: cache only. Privileged ARP sweep needs adv-scanner.
arp.empty: No neighbors in the ARP cache.
arp.emptyQuiet: No neighbors found — quiet network, or probes were filtered.
arp.emptyIsolation: Only the gateway responded — guest Wi‑Fi / client isolation is likely.
arp.emptyPermission: No usable IPv4 — check Local Network permission in System Settings.

lanSvc.hint: Browse mDNS/DNS-SD and SSDP/UPnP announcements on the local network (read-only).
lanSvc.readOnlyHint: Read-only discovery. No UPnP Write / AddPortMapping actions are exposed.
lanSvc.empty: No mDNS/SSDP responses in the listen window.

pcap.hint: Short counter-only packet sample (RST / retransmit hints). Full pcap write stays opt-in.
pcap.degradedHint: Degraded: tcpdump counters when available. Install pcap-diag for richer diagnostics.

nodes.hint: Compare DNS answers from this Mac and Globalping locations. Register HTTPS agents for self-hosted probes.
nodes.addHint: Endpoint must be https:// or wss://. Arbitrary shell actions are rejected.

nat.hint: STUN Binding against a public server to learn your mapped address / NAT exposure.

ntp.hint: Query pool.ntp.org for clock offset. Large skew can break TLS and auth.

report.hint: Export the latest health scan and browse the session command log.
report.title: Network Probe health report
report.empty: No health scan to export yet.
report.historyEmpty: No saved health scans yet. Run a health scan to keep history.
report.privacyHint: Exports may include public IP, Wi‑Fi SSID, hosts overrides, and local addresses. Share only with people you trust.

traceroute.hint: Path hop table via trippy (privileged ICMP, falls back to unprivileged UDP). Loss % is color-coded. ASN via Team Cymru DNS (may be empty).
traceroute.empty: No hops yet. Run a trace to populate the table.

packs.dialogHint: Advanced scanners and helpers install from a backend manifest only — the UI never supplies download URLs (D-017).
packs.gatekeeperNote: Ad-hoc / unsigned builds cannot claim Gatekeeper trust for sidecars (D-010).
packs.empty: No packs available on this platform.
packs.missingHint: This tool needs an optional pack ({{packId}}).

desc.privHelper: Privileged helper service (priv-helper; notarization required for trust).

caps.toolDisabled: {{tool}} status={{status}} — action disabled by capabilities matrix
caps.localNetworkHint: All probes lost. This may be Local Network permission (macOS Privacy), a firewall, or a real outage — not a single conclusion.

coming.mvp: This panel is queued for the MVP A+B slices after P0 foundations.
coming.post: Designed and reserved for Post-MVP. Not part of module 1.0 delivery.

errors.bootstrapFailed: Failed to load network probe capabilities.
errors.openSettingsFailed: Could not open system network settings.
errors.securityAuthRequired: Authorize the Security tab before running these tools.
